title: Sovereign P2P Topology
requirements: Gossip-protocol based node discovery across regional shards.
Hierarchical topology: Egypt-soil nodes serve as 'Primary Sovereignty Roots'.
Adaptive routing: Automatically bypass non-compliant or lagging cloud regions.
Compliance: mTLS enforcement for all cross-border P2P traffic.

logic.discovery: Scan for regional shard endpoints via Cloud-Gateway.
logic.clustering: Group shards into 'Regional Sub-Galaxies' for localized sync.
logic.governance: Elect 'Omega Nodes' for global equilibrium maintenance.
